title: Another. (Sin.)
content:
Sin is an act so free, that if we shall
    Say 'tis not free, 'tis then no sin at all.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another. (Sin.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
